calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler, via ZOOM, for Charmaine Aslan, Personal Representative; Holly Collier, Interested Party.

The court questions Ms. Wheeler regarding whether a Guardian Ad Litem should be appointed in this matter for Ms. Collier's child. Ms. Wheeler disagrees and provides oral argument in support of her position including that the decedent's will is not clear that any grandchildren would receive distributions. The court then confirms with Ms. Collier that her child is eleven years old.

After additional discussion, the Accounting petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court noted that it received a filing regarding the efforts made in locating the Decedent's Ex-Wife indicating that they hired an investigator to search for Mickey Aslan and stated that it is satisfied with the efforts that were made. No one was present to object to the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated February 9, 1995 is admitted to probate. Charmaine Aslan is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed and with full authority. Bond is not required as all the heirs are adults and have waived bond. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 20, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution is filed by that date, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Continued To Jan-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler appeared by zoom for Charmaine Aslan (Petitioner).

The Court expressed concern about the issue of notice to Mickey Aslan and whether enough investigation has been taken to locate Ms. Aslan. Ms. Wheeler stated that all of Mr. Aslan's ex-wives were named, that they were very brief marriages, that no one in the family has any information, that the ex-wives may have changed their names and that they were unable to locate them. Ms. Wheeler also stated that the Paralegal is very experienced at doing internet searches, and that the ex-wives are not heirs or beneficiaries of the estate. The Court stated that it thinks a little more is needed, that it prefers to see a report from a Professional and that the Professionals have better access to a data base. Ms. Wheeler stated that the only asset is a piece of real property in San Francisco, that it is valuable because of the land it sits on and that a significant amount of work on the house is needed. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is continued to January 20, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.
